channel.title: Sensitivity Labels on Niklas Precenth - Purview, Copilot & Microsoft 365
channel.description: Recent content in Sensitivity Labels on Niklas Precenth - Purview, Copilot & Microsoft 365

item.title: The Case of the Missing AdvancedSettings: A Container Label Mystery
item.description: How a routine container label configuration uncovered an undocumented change in ExchangeOnlineManagement 3.9.x — and why it matters for Copilot governance.
